verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The agents unanimously identified the Netherlands based on strong visual evidence (yellow plates, Dutch toponym, brick architecture). The judge correctly synthesized these signals to confirm the region and country.
verdict.region_narrowing_notes: All five agents agreed on the Netherlands (Western Europe). The consensus was immediate and robust, requiring no complex hypothesis generation.
verdict.hypothesis_pool_notes: The pool included the correct answer (Netherlands) and plausible neighbors (Belgium, Germany, Luxembourg) that share similar visual features.
